2606.30395.title: Uncovering Salience-Driven Dynamics in Consumer Confidence with Generative Social Simulation
2606.30395.paper_summary: Consumer confidence is typically modeled as a persistent macroeconomic index, yet its movements arise from households that interpret economic information through heterogeneous constraints, exposures, prior beliefs, and attention. We introduce ConsumerSim, a generative Human--Environment response framework that reconstructs Consumer Confidence Index (CCI) dynamics from a microdata-calibrated synthetic population, time-stamped macroeconomic, financial, policy, and news signals, survey-like response generation, post-stratified belief expansion, and behavioral inertia alignment. Across U.S., EU27, and Japanese official CCI target series, ConsumerSim ranks first among persistence, time-series, regression, and information-augmented baselines on the reported reconstruction metrics, with clear gains around high-salience shocks. Its reconstructed signal also improves short-horizon prediction of real activity, most consistently for housing outcomes. Mechanism analyses show that CCI movements concentrate around salient events; subgroup trajectories often align in direction while differing in magnitude; and signal sensitivity varies across income, homeownership, education, and political-alignment groups. Population-expansion and ablation results indicate that representative aggregation, situational signals, persona heterogeneity, and inertia are necessary for both accuracy and diagnosis. The findings support a behavioral view of consumer confidence as an interpretable Human--Environment response process rather than a purely aggregate time series.
2606.30395.paper_summary_zh: 消費者信心通常被建模為一個持久的宏觀經濟指標，但其變動源於家庭通過異質約束、暴露、先前信念和注意力來解讀經濟信息。我們引入了ConsumerSim，一個生成性的人類-環境反應框架，該框架從微觀數據校準的合成人口、時間戳的宏觀經濟、金融、政策和新聞信號、類似調查的反應生成、後分層信念擴展以及行為慣性對齊中重建消費者信心指數（CCI）動態。在美國、歐盟27國和日本的官方CCI目標系列中，ConsumerSim在報告的重建指標上，在持久性、時間序列、回歸和信息增強基準中排名第一，並在高顯著性衝擊周圍顯示出明顯的增益。其重建的信號還改善了對實際活動的短期預測，尤其是對住房結果的預測最為一致。機制分析顯示，CCI變動集中在顯著事件周圍；子群體的軌跡往往在方向上對齊，但在幅度上有所不同；而信號敏感性在收入、房屋擁有權、教育和政治對齊群體之間變化。人口擴展和消融結果表明，代表性聚合、情境信號、角色異質性和慣性對於準確性和診斷都是必要的。這些發現支持將消費者信心視為一個可解釋的人類-環境反應過程的行為觀點，而不是純粹的總體時間序列。
2606.30395.author: Yixu Huang et.al.
2606.30395.authors: Yixu Huang, Yunlu Yin, Jiayu Lin, Xinnong Zhang, Jia Wang, Siyuan Wang, Xuanjing Huang, Liyin Jin, Zhongyu Wei
